steps.t: The Splintered Shield is located on the Second Tier of Minas Tirith. You should go to The Splintered Shield in Minas Tirith and sample wines.
You have found the wine the wedding planner requested. You should pick up the wine cask and bring it to the wedding planner in Minas Tirith.
The wedding planner Merilien is on the Seventh Circle of Minas Tirith. You should bring the cask to Merilien.
